REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET TWO

PROPOUNDING PARTY: Plaintiff Jane Henderson
RESPONDING PARTY: Defendant Acme Corporation

REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION NO. 1:
All DOCUMENTS constituting, reflecting, or relating to any policies, procedures, or guidelines regarding employee discipline, termination, or separation, including but not limited to employee handbooks, policy manuals, and standard operating procedures.

REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION NO. 2:
All DOCUMENTS constituting or reflecting communications between any of YOUR managers, supervisors, or human resources personnel regarding Plaintiff, including but not limited to emails, text messages, instant messages, memoranda, and notes.

REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION NO. 3:
All DOCUMENTS relating to any complaint of discrimination, harassment, or retaliation made by any employee of YOUR company during the period January 1, 2020 through the present.

REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION NO. 4:
Produce YOUR complete personnel file for Plaintiff, including but not limited to applications, resumes, offer letters, performance reviews, disciplinary records, and separation documents.
